foreignObject.div: An extensible framework for reproducible deep-learning side-channel analysis, experiment automation, evaluation, ranking, and reporting.
A machine-learning research system developed for robust surface-based analysis, reproducible experimentation, and scientific evaluation.
A private generator pipeline that builds, validates, and publishes animated TRON-themed SVG assets and contribution visualizations.
A responsive personal research portfolio designed as a structured interface between technical work, publications, and professional identity.
